title: オークスの後に・ヒロインは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lose the Japanese Oaks! But a princess keeps her
head held high and pushes onward to her happy
ending!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have everyone's support! I really am the
heroine! No one is more fit to be a princess than
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up, I'll conquer the Shuka Sho! Take this
Princess☆Uppercut packed with fighting spirit!
